function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"summary": "Generated BDD scenarios for hello-world-plan-exhaustion", "deliverable": {"scenarios": [{"given": "the Flask API server is running", "when": "a GET request is sent to the endpoint", "then": ["a 200 status code is returned", "the response body contains a JSON object with a 'message' field"]}, {"given": "the Flask API server is running", "when": "a GET request is sent to an unknown endpoint", "then": ["a 404 status code is returned"]}]}}
